title: Baubles Stuff
description:
This mod adds some Baubles Stuff and a lot of upgrades for it!

Here you can find modular baubles. One bauble and a lot of upgrades for it, that works at the same time.
body:
![Baubles Stuff Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1eade9400fd3fad99b6f45b3752c6716f8925cd.jpeg)



**This mod adds some Baubles Stuff and a lot of upgrades for it!**

_Here you can find modular baubles. One bauble and a lot of upgrades for it, that works at the same time._

**All things that you need are in one bauble! **

_For applying upgrade just add it in craft grid._

 
**Blocks:**

**Upgrade Extractor**

Allows you to return your upgrades back. Just right click it with bauble in your hand.

**Experience Generator**

BSU generator. Works on player levels. Shift Right Click with 
Experience Stuff to transfer levels in it.

**Available upgrades:**
**Belt:**

**HighStep Upgrade**

You can walk on 1 block without jumping.

**Speed Upgrade**

Increases players speed.

**Jump Upgrade**

Increases players jump height.

**Flying Upgrade**

Gains creative fly to player.


**Pendant:**
**Fire Immune Upgrade**

You can swim in lava and absorb any fire damage.

**Fall Damage Immune Upgrade**

You can't get damage from falling.

**Wither Immune Upgrade**

Wither debuff can't be applied to you.

**Water Breathing Upgrade**

You can breath underwater.

**Health Regeneration Upgrade**

Slowly regenerates health.

**Vampire Upgrade**

You heal 1\3 of your damage. Great with swords! (Only for 1.9 version.)


**Ring:**

_If you have more than one "Ring" equipped, buffs will not work!_

 

**Invisibility Upgrade**

Gains invisibility.

**Night Vision Upgrade**

Gives permanent nigh vision.

**Haste Upgrade**

Fast mining.

**Power Upgrade**

MORE DAMAGE!!!

**Plant Acceleration Upgrade**

Increase plants growth speed.

**Stuff Repairing Upgrade**

Repair your tools and armor.

**Plant Harvest Upgrade**

Automatically harvests plants. Nice in combination with magnet ring. (Only for 1.7.10 & 1.9 versions.)


**Magnet Ring:**

It pulls items towards you. Do you need upgrades here?!

**Instantaneous Magnet Ring:**

Puts items directly to your inventory.


**Experience Stuff:**

Right Click to store levels.
